author: m.kalinin
content: We have `head_payload_status` check in the FC test format, why would we not put this check to the `head: {slot, root, payload_status}`, the letter is only rendered for Gloas tests? Is there a specific reason for `head_payload_status` being outside the head bucket?

author: dmitriishmatko
content: It was at least for alpha.7. We have ignored this test.

author: jtraglia
content: Ah sorry, you mentioned this to me at interop and I forgot to follow up 🤦‍♂️
